About Us

About Us

About Us

Founded in 2011, D&P Interiors began with a shared vision: to create spaces that not only function seamlessly but leave a lasting impression.
What started as a passionate team of builders and planners has now become one of the most trusted names in fit-out execution.
At D&P, we’re committed to precision, quality, and timely delivery — making every square foot count. From retail rollouts to residential transformations, we take pride in turning every plan into a purposeful space.

What We Do

What We Do

What We Do

Services

Residential Interior Design
Tailored design services for private homes, including room makeovers and complete home transformations.
Commercial Interior Design
Designing functional and attractive interiors for offices, retail spaces, and hospitality venues.
Space Planning
Optimizing the layout of a space to improve functionality and flow.
Design Consultation
Providing professional advice on concepts, color schemes & material selection.
Lighting Design
Crafting lighting solutions that enhance the ambiance and functionality of a space.
Custom Furniture Design
Designing and creating bespoke furniture pieces that perfectly fit your space and style.
Art and Accessory Procurement
Sourcing and selecting art pieces and accessories to complement the overall design.
Color Consultation
Assisting clients in selecting color schemes that enhance the mood and aesthetic of a space.
Custom Furniture Design
Designing and creating bespoke furniture pieces that perfectly fit your space and style.
Styling and Staging
Designing and creating bespoke furniture pieces that perfectly fit your space and style.

Designing and creating bespoke furniture pieces that perfectly fit your space and style.

Why you'll love working with D&P Interiors

"Design is more than just aesthetics; it's a reflection of the soul and a journey towards creating timeless spaces that resonate with individuality and purpose. At D&P Interiors, we strive to craft environments that not only captivate the eye but also inspire the mind and nurture the spirit."

FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS

FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS

FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS

Your questions, our answers

Your questions, our answers

What kind of projects does D&P specialize in?

We specialize in turnkey interior fit-out projects across retail, commercial, and residential spaces — including stores, offices, clinics, and custom concept stores.

What kind of projects does D&P specialize in?

We specialize in turnkey interior fit-out projects across retail, commercial, and residential spaces — including stores, offices, clinics, and custom concept stores.

What kind of projects does D&P specialize in?

We specialize in turnkey interior fit-out projects across retail, commercial, and residential spaces — including stores, offices, clinics, and custom concept stores.

Do you manage the full execution or only specific services?

We offer complete end-to-end execution. From civil work and carpentry to MEP, signage, and final handover — we manage everything so you don’t have to coordinate with multiple vendors.

Do you manage the full execution or only specific services?

We offer complete end-to-end execution. From civil work and carpentry to MEP, signage, and final handover — we manage everything so you don’t have to coordinate with multiple vendors.

Do you manage the full execution or only specific services?

We offer complete end-to-end execution. From civil work and carpentry to MEP, signage, and final handover — we manage everything so you don’t have to coordinate with multiple vendors.

Can you handle multi-location or brand rollouts?

Absolutely. We’ve successfully executed 1,150+ projects, including large-scale retail rollouts across cities. Our project management and coordination expertise ensures consistency across all locations.

Can you handle multi-location or brand rollouts?

Absolutely. We’ve successfully executed 1,150+ projects, including large-scale retail rollouts across cities. Our project management and coordination expertise ensures consistency across all locations.

Can you handle multi-location or brand rollouts?

Absolutely. We’ve successfully executed 1,150+ projects, including large-scale retail rollouts across cities. Our project management and coordination expertise ensures consistency across all locations.

How do you ensure timely project delivery?

We simulate the project in advance, identifying risks and creating contingency plans. This proactive planning helps us stay on track and maintain timelines without compromising quality.

How do you ensure timely project delivery?

We simulate the project in advance, identifying risks and creating contingency plans. This proactive planning helps us stay on track and maintain timelines without compromising quality.

How do you ensure timely project delivery?

We simulate the project in advance, identifying risks and creating contingency plans. This proactive planning helps us stay on track and maintain timelines without compromising quality.

Do you work with malls or airports?

Yes. We’ve worked in over 25 malls and multiple airport locations across India. We understand mall protocols and approval processes, which helps us expedite execution in such environments.

Do you work with malls or airports?

Yes. We’ve worked in over 25 malls and multiple airport locations across India. We understand mall protocols and approval processes, which helps us expedite execution in such environments.
